Package com.dtwthalion.mpgo.providers

Interface StorageDataset

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
public interface StorageDataset extends AutoCloseable
One 1-D typed array or compound-record array.

API status: Stable (Provisional per M39 — may change before v1.0).

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C MPGOStorageDataset, Python mpeg_o.providers.base.StorageDataset.

Since:
0.6

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default long[]
    chunks()
    Chunk shape, or null for contiguous storage.
    default void
    close()
     
    List<CompoundField>
    compoundFields()
    Compound field schema, or null for primitive datasets.
    Object
    getAttribute(String name)
     
    boolean
    hasAttribute(String name)
     
    default long
    length()
    Size along the first axis (= shape()[0]).
    String
    name()
     
    Enums.Precision
    precision()
    Primitive precision, or null for compound datasets (use compoundFields() there).
    Object

    Read all elements.
    Object

    Hyperslab read: count elements starting at offset.

    Full shape tuple.
    void
    writeAll(Object data)
     

  • Method Details

    • name

      String name()

    • precision

      Enums.Precision precision()
      Primitive precision, or null for compound datasets (use compoundFields() there).

    • shape

      long[] shape()
      Full shape tuple. 1-D datasets return {N}.

    • length

      default long length()
      Size along the first axis (= shape()[0]).

    • chunks

      default long[] chunks()
      Chunk shape, or null for contiguous storage.

    • compoundFields

      List<CompoundField> compoundFields()
      Compound field schema, or null for primitive datasets.

    • readAll

      Object readAll()
      Read all elements. Return type matches the precision: double[] for FLOAT64, int[] for INT32/UINT32, long[] for INT64, float[] for FLOAT32, byte[] (native packing) for COMPLEX128. Compound datasets return a List<Object[]> of row values.

    • readSlice

      Object readSlice(long offset, long count)
      Hyperslab read: count elements starting at offset. Same return-type rules as readAll().

    • writeAll

      void writeAll(Object data)

    • hasAttribute

      boolean hasAttribute(String name)

    • getAttribute

      Object getAttribute(String name)

    • setAttribute

      void setAttribute(String name, Object value)

    • close

      default void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
